paragraphs.text: 每个周末我们都会去爷爷奶奶家。爷爷奶奶住在乡下，那里空气很好。
paragraphs.translation: Every weekend we visit Grandpa and Grandma. They live in the countryside where the air is fresh.

paragraphs.text: 爷爷种了很多蔬菜，有西红柿、黄瓜、豆角。每次去我都会帮爷爷浇菜。
paragraphs.translation: Grandpa grows lots of vegetables: tomatoes, cucumbers, green beans. Every time I visit I help Grandpa water the vegetables.

paragraphs.text: 奶奶会做很多好吃的。她包的水饺最好吃了。我喜欢去爷爷奶奶家！
paragraphs.translation: Grandma makes lots of delicious food. The dumplings she makes are the best. I love visiting Grandpa and Grandma!
